violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the basement bar area was observed with bottles/items in it. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

At the time of inspection, the small mini fridge behind the bar was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit is not to be used for storage of Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods until repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The floor to the side of the 3 bay sink and the ceiling soffit above the 3 bay sink was observed in need of repair/refinishing. Physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

The floor and wall junctures behind the 3 bay sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
